# OneSubscription

Observe existing OCI OneSubscription subscription summaries from Kubernetes with a query-backed, controller-managed read-only contract.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `onesubscription` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-onesubscription-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-onesubscription:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-onesubscription-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to onesubscription/Subscription while commitment, invoice, rate-card, and subscribed-service helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime is query-backed and observe-only: it paginates ListSubscriptions with compartmentId plus exactly one of planNumber, subscriptionId, or buyerEmail, rejects ambiguous results, and does not invent a tracked top-level OCI Subscription identity.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
